user.title: Circuit Light
user.description:
Combine a relay/switch with one or more smart bulbs into a unified light entity.

Note: Bulb order matters for sequential effects (Rainbow Chase, Colour Wipe).

error.invalid_power_entity: The selected power entity could not be found.
error.invalid_bulb_entities: One or more selected bulb entities could not be found.

abort.already_configured: This power entity is already configured.

init.title: Circuit Light Options
init.description:
Edit the Circuit Light configuration.

Note: Bulb order matters for sequential effects (Rainbow Chase, Colour Wipe).

reauth_confirm.title: Reauthenticate Circuit Light
reauth_confirm.description: Some of the configured entities could not be found. Re-select the power entity and bulbs to continue.
